Setlist
Venue Info
Media Gallery
Toyota Pavilion at Concord
Concord, CA
Previous Names:
Concord Pavilion (Changed after 1999)
Chronicle Pavilion at Concord (Changed after 2006)
Sleep Train Pavilion at Concord (Changed after 2013)
Seating Capacity: 12500
Venue Type : Outdoor Amphitheater

Total Gigs: 3
  DMB  (3)

Longest Performance:
07.07.97 - Jimi Thing (14:31)

Song Liberations
  8.25.10 – If I Had It All (after 1076 days)
Venue Picture
Description
Concord Pavilion opened in 1975 in the foothills of Mt. Diablo. It comprises 7,932 reserved seats and a 4,568-capacity lawn for a total of 12,500.

2000 Kirker Pass Rd.
Concord, CA 94521
